name: Kaliseum
description: Kaliseum is a place to play pickleball in Kalkaska, MI. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $6 per person during drop-in times - $25 private court 1 hour - $45 private court 2 hours
